arts.ttl: Man City learn opponents for FA Cup fourth round clash amid gruelling four-match run
arts.sum: Manchester City will return to FA Cup action in February after an 8-0 thumping victory over Salford City at the weekend

arts.ttl: 'We talked' - Pep Guardiola singles out two players after Man City collapse
arts.sum: Manchester City were 2-0 up at Brentford but contrived to suffer another setback as the home side equalised late on

arts.ttl: Man City next six fixtures compared to Liverpool, Arsenal and Chelsea after dramatic Premier League night
arts.sum: Manchester City drew 2-2 with Brentford in the Premier League on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Brentford hit back from two down to draw with Manchester City
arts.sum: Phil Foden’s double had Pep Guardiola’s team in control in west London.

arts.ttl: Vintage Kevin De Bruyne! Man City star hailed for 'world class' assist against Brentford - as Belgian star puts it on a plate for Phil Foden
arts.sum: The Belgian star put the ball on a plate for his team-mate with a stunning cross as the Englishman volleyed into the corner to put Manchester City 1-0 up on Tuesday night after 66 minutes.

arts.ttl: Man City close to deal for teenage defender Reis
arts.sum: Manchester City move closer to the signature of Brazilian teenage defender Vitor Reis from Palmeiras in a deal reported to be worth £29.4 million.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola risks Cole Palmer repeat with Man City decision after weekend warning
arts.sum: Manchester City head to Brentford and Pep Guardiola has opted to put Saturday's hat-trick hero, James McAtee, on the bench as he resists calls to throw in his young playmaker

arts.ttl: Latest on Man City's Omar Marmoush pursuit: Citizens 'submit official bid' as Eintracht Frankfurt forward starts against Freiburg
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly submit an official transfer bid to sign Egypt international Omar Marmoush from Bundesliga side Eintracht Frankufrt.

arts.ttl: 'Not going to' - Why Kyle Walker is not in Man City squad to face Brentford
arts.sum: Manchester City are playing in the Premier League against Brentford bu Kyle Walker will not be involved

arts.ttl: Brentford v Manchester City, Chelsea v Bournemouth: Premier League – live
arts.sum: News from Tuesday’s 7.30pm GMT kick-offs and beyond Live scores | Latest table | Premier League top scorers The Manchester City players will wear black armbands tonight in tribute to the legendary Tony Book, their former captain and manager, who has died aged 90. There’s no Kyle Walker in the Man City squad. Here’s Jonathan Liew on why the career of one of England’s greatest right-backs is ripe for reappraisal. Based on media footprint alone, Walker might well be one of the most chronicled English footballers of the past decade, and largely for issues unrelated to anything he did in a defensive transition. Search the internet for this player of 93 England caps and pretty much every medal at club level and you will be deluged with various keyword-rich morsels of celebrity gossip swimming in pound signs, house prices and gigantic photos ripped from Instagram. Continue reading...
